/usr/bin/ar qc libpirate_ship_lib.a CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/entities/Ship.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/entities/Obstacle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/entities/Treasure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/engine/ObstacleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/engine/TreasureManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/engine/ShipManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/engine/BoardMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/engine/GameEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/engine/ScoreManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pirate_ship_lib.dir/ui/GameApplication.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpirate_ship_lib.a
